summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival injects Ferrari with newfound momentum as the Scuderia seeks to capitalize on their Spanish Grand Prix breakthrough and sustain pressure on championship rivals. McLaren's consistency against Red Bull's resurgence sets up a three-way fight for strategic supremacy, with tire management and DRS deployment becoming critical differentiators on Spa's high-speed layout. A win here could signal whether Hamilton's presence genuinely transforms Ferrari's title credentials or merely provides a temporary confidence boost in an otherwise inconsistent season.
